acceptanceCriteria: rigor consult-decide persists each independent-review decision as an append-only artifact under .rigor/evidence/<task>/review-decisions/ with a UUID-suffixed filename, mirroring how rigor escalate persists to escalations/
The persisted artifact contains the pure decision fields plus artifactId and createdAt and the existing inputHash, and validates against independent-review-decision.v1
selectConsultation remains pure with no I/O, clock read, or model call; the write happens only in the CLI layer
A --dry-run flag preserves the prior stdout-only behavior and writes nothing
Decisions stay advisory: approvalEffect remains none, no linkage into verification/review/CI, and exit codes are unchanged (stop-required-review yields 2, otherwise 0)
Existing tests plus a new persistence test pass and required repository checks pass
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
